texto: Poets, Writers . . . know that we are the enchanting magicians that nourishes the seeds of dreams and thoughts . . . it is our words that entice the hearts and minds of others to believe there is something grand about the possibilities that life has to offer and our words tease it forth into action . . . for you are the Poet, the Writer to whom the Gift of Words has been entrusted . . . wsp
explicacao: Citação de William S. Peters sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Poets, Writers . . . know that we are the enchanting magicians that nourishes the seeds of dreams…” articula amor, duty-in-this-world, inner-child em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como inner-child e love.
